A missing signature verification in User OIDC allowed a malicious ID4me authority to identify as any user.

### Patches

It is recommended that the User OIDC app is upgraded to 3.1.0, 4.1.0, 5.1.0, 6.4.0 or 8.3.0

### Workarounds

* Disable the ID4me feature in the configuration

### References

* [HackerOne](https://hackerone.com/reports/3489490)
* [PullRequest](https://github.com/nextcloud/user_oidc/pull/1285)

### For more information

If you have any questions or comments about this advisory:

* Create a post in [nextcloud/security-advisories](https://github.com/nextcloud/security-advisories/discussions)

title: Authentication Bypass in ID4me handling via Missing JWT Signature Verification in User OIDC
